overall.description: First-person exploration through a vibrant cyberpunk shantytown constructed from corrugated metal and neon signage. The player navigates elevated walkways, enters a retro arcade with glowing pink neon hearts, and traverses narrow alleys with a futuristic city skyline visible in the distance. The environment features gritty industrial textures, colorful graffiti, and scattered NPCs.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow elevated walkway constructed from corrugated metal planks. The player approaches an arcade entrance marked by pink neon signage, passing a seated NPC on the left. Industrial shacks line both sides with power lines crisscrossing overhead.

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dimly lit arcade with a green corrugated metal ceiling and vibrant pink neon signage. Two NPCs occupy the space—one at a counter and another near the game machines. The environment is cluttered with red stools and retro gaming cabinets.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the arcade, the player ascends red metal stairs between tightly packed corrugated shacks. The futuristic city skyline becomes visible in the distance beyond the shantytown. NPCs occupy the walkway, including one drinking against a wall and another climbing ahead.

reaches top of stairs entering upper alley with closed shop fronts

segments.scene_description: The player transitions from metal walkways to a concrete stairway with red railings, passing graffiti-covered walls. Two NPCs stand near the top of the stairs. The city skyline shifts to the left as the player reaches an upper level alley with industrial buildings.

segments.scene_description: The final segment traverses a narrow cobblestone alley lined with closed metal shutters and green dumpsters. The player passes a burning trash barrel and approaches a red car parked at the alley's end. The area is devoid of people, emphasizing the gritty, abandoned atmosphere of the upper shantytown levels.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling neon-lit arcade entrance through an ascending series of industrial walkways and into a desolate upper-level alley. It begins on a narrow elevated walkway of corrugated metal, passing a seated NPC and crisscrossing power lines before entering a dimly lit arcade filled with pink neon signage, retro gaming cabinets, and red stools. As the camera exits the arcade, the scene shifts upward along red metal stairs between packed shacks, gradually revealing a futuristic city skyline in the distance while passing various NPCs on the path. The movement then transitions from metal walkways to a concrete stairway with graffiti-covered walls and red railings, shifting the skyline to the left as the camera reaches an upper industrial level. Finally, the environment opens into a narrow cobblestone alley lined with closed metal shutters and green dumpsters, passing a burning trash barrel toward a lone red car in a gritty, abandoned atmosphere.
